2605.31370.title: HypoAgent: An Agentic Framework for Interactive Abductive Hypothesis Generation over Knowledge Graphs
2605.31370.paper_summary: Abductive reasoning over knowledge graphs aims to generate logical hypotheses that explain observed entities or facts. Existing controllable hypothesis generation methods allow users to guide this process with explicit conditions, but they remain limited in interactive settings: they struggle to ground evolving natural-language intents across multi-turn dialogues and provide little fine-grained diagnosis when generated hypotheses fail. To address these limitations, we propose HypoAgent, an Agentic framework for interactive abductive Hypothesis Generation over knowledge graphs. HypoAgent integrates three agents: an Intent Recognition Agent that grounds user utterances and dialogue history into executable KG conditions, a Hypothesis Generation Agent that performs controllable hypothesis generation according to the extracted user intention, and a Root Cause Analysis Agent that diagnoses unreliable hypothesis fragments and leverages KG neighborhood probing to identify supported refinements. Experiments on commonsense and biomedical domain-specific knowledge graphs demonstrate that HypoAgent achieves state-of-the-art semantic similarity under single-turn, multi-turn, and unconditional settings. Our code is available at https://github.com/HKUST-KnowComp/HypoAgent.
2605.31370.paper_summary_zh: 推理知識圖譜的歸納推理旨在生成解釋觀察到的實體或事實的邏輯假設。現有的可控假設生成方法允許用戶用明確的條件來指導這一過程，但在互動環境中仍然有限：它們難以在多輪對話中將不斷演變的自然語言意圖具體化，並且在生成的假設失敗時提供的細緻診斷也很少。為了解決這些限制，我們提出了HypoAgent，一個針對知識圖譜的互動歸納假設生成的代理框架。HypoAgent整合了三個代理：一個意圖識別代理，將用戶的話語和對話歷史轉化為可執行的KG條件；一個假設生成代理，根據提取的用戶意圖執行可控的假設生成；以及一個根本原因分析代理，診斷不可靠的假設片段，並利用KG鄰域探測來識別支持的細化。對常識和生物醫學領域特定知識圖譜的實驗表明，HypoAgent在單輪、多輪和無條件設置下達到了最先進的語義相似度。我們的代碼可在https://github.com/HKUST-KnowComp/HypoAgent獲得。
2605.31370.author: Yisen Gao et.al.
2605.31370.authors: Yisen Gao, Yixi Cai, Tianshi Zheng, Jiaxin Bai, Yangqiu Song
